narrative:
Cols 58-I (precinct in Franklin County) has 785 registered voters, with 64.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.1 percentage points.
